info.description: REST API relay server for accessing Foundry VTT data remotely. Provides WebSocket connectivity and HTTP endpoints to interact with Foundry VTT worlds.
info.title: FoundryVTT REST API

parameters.description: Client ID for the Foundry world
parameters.name: clientId

parameters.description: Comma-separated hook names to filter (hooks type only)
parameters.name: hooks

parameters.description: Filter by encounter ID (combat type only)
parameters.name: encounterId

parameters.description: Actor UUID to subscribe to (actor type, required)
parameters.name: actorUuid

parameters.description: Scene ID to filter (scene type only)
parameters.name: sceneId

400.description: Bad request - missing or invalid parameters

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing API key
